author: MPR News
title: Jury finds two men guilty in human smuggling trial; Legal challenge in election over candidate's home address
text:
Jury finds two men guilty in human smuggling trial; Legal challenge in election over candidate's home address
Go Deeper.
Create an account or log in to save stories.
Like this?
Thanks for liking this story! We have added it to a list of your favorite stories.
The jury in the federal human smuggling trial in Fergus Falls today returned
[guilty verdicts](/story/2024/11/22/2-men-convicted-human-smuggling-indian-familys-death) on all counts against Hari Patel and Steve Shand.
The four Republican members of Minnesota's U.S. House delegation hope to influence President-elect Donald Trump's choices for federal appointments in the state.
And
[another legal challenge](/story/2024/11/22/republican-who-lost-minn-house-race-sues-claiming-democratic-winner-lives-outside-district) looms over a Minnesota House race in the knotted-up legislative chamber.
Those stories and more in today’s evening update from MPR News. Hosted by Emily Reese. Music by Gary Meister.
